head_commit.message:
chore: bump version and update kspin dependency to 0.2 (#53)

* chore: bump version and update kspin dependency to 0.2 across multiple Cargo.toml files

* chore: update axcpu to version 0.3.1 and change source to crates.io

* chore: bump axplat version to 0.4.1 across multiple platforms

* upcate cargo.lock
